title: Gooey Spicy Ukrainian Tofu Bake
description: A cozy, cheesetopped tofu bake packed with heat, creamy toppings, and a crunchy vegetable base, perfect for a comforting Ukrainianstyle dinner.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 190°C (375°F) and line a 9‑inch baking dish with parchment paper.
Press the tofu for 20 minutes to remove excess moisture, then cube it.
Whisk soy sauce, smoked paprika, red pepper flakes, salt, pepper, and olive oil in a bowl; toss the tofu cubes to coat and let marinate for 15 minutes.
Arrange diced carrots, bell pepper, onion, and garlic in the baking dish; sprinkle marinated tofu on top.
Evenly distribute shredded cheddar and diced sour cream over the vegetables and tofu.
Bake for 25–30 minutes until the cheese melts and edges of the tofu crisp up.
Remove from oven, let rest 5 minutes, then serve hot with fresh dill or parsley if desired.
